g.title: projects
g.text: A portfolio project — the unit that groups repositories and can consume microservice projects.
Added v12, default 'standard'. No SQL CHECK — the legal vocabulary is enforced in Rust only.
Manual ordering (v14); back-filled as id * 10 to leave gaps for inserts.
v28 — 0/1 opt-in for the background auto-sync timer.

g.title: project_microservices
g.text: Many-to-many link between a parent project and a consumed microservice project. Rebuilt in v12 — before that it linked a project to a repository. Composite PK plus CHECK(project_id != microservice_project_id), so a project cannot consume itself.

g.title: project_microservices:microservice_project_id->projects:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (microservice_project_id) REFERENCES projects (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

g.title: project_microservices:project_id->projects:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (project_id) REFERENCES projects (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

g.title: repositories
g.text: A repository belonging to at most one project. May be GitHub-backed or local-only.
ON DELETE SET NULL — the only non-cascading FK in the schema. Deleting a project orphans its repositories rather than destroying them.
UNIQUE, and nullable since v13 so local-only repos (never pushed to GitHub) can exist. The last path segment is the canonical folder name used for all cross-repo doc folders.
'microservice' is still legal here but is legacy: v12 NULLed every such row when microservice became a project type rather than a repo role.
Stable GitHub identifier — the basis of rename detection.
Lazy-migration marker (v18); NULL means the repo's MD has never been imported.
Lazy-migration marker (v21). While NULL, the first task sync suppresses 'created' events so backfilling legacy files doesn't flood the timeline.
v25 — JSON map of repo-wide (not per-environment) deploy placeholder values.
v28 — NULL means auto-commit is off for this repo.

g.title: repositories:project_id->projects:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (project_id) REFERENCES projects (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE SET NULL MATCH NONE

g.title: project_renames
g.text: Project-level twin of repo_renames (v24). Needed because microservice-api/<name>/ folders on the parent-server side are keyed by project name, which repo_renames does not cover.

g.title: project_renames:project_id->projects:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (project_id) REFERENCES projects (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
